Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JOSEPH LUBIN, CONSENSYS SOFTWARE, INC.'s Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Quash Service For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court allows jurisdictional discovery. The Court orders the parties to meet and confer. The Court continues the matter for a status hearing to March 20, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants ConsenSys Software Inc. (CSI) and Joseph Lubin move to quash service of the first amended complaint (FAC) for lack of personal jurisdiction. Plaintiff in turn requests jurisdictional discovery, which request is granted. (See Magnecomp Corp. v. Athene Co. (1989) 209 Cal.App.3d 526, 533.) Hearing required as to logistics of jurisdictional discovery.

Order signed.
